info.name: BasicDiet145 Dashboard API - Full
info.description: Complete Dashboard/Admin Postman collection for BasicDiet145. Scope: /api/dashboard/*, /api/dashboard/auth/*, /api/dashboard/ops/*, and backward-compatible /api/admin/meal-planner-menu/* routes where noted. Mobile/public APIs are intentionally excluded. Subscription timeline note: the mobile GET /api/subscriptions/:id/timeline endpoint also applies the same backend past-day auto-settlement policy before returning days.

exec: // Collection-level defaults. Switch baseUrl to {{localBaseUrl}} manually when testing local backend.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Auth endpoints for Dashboard/Admin API testing.

request.description:
Returns the active dashboard user for a valid token. With no/invalid optional token the controller returns ok:false,user:null rather than 401.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

Issues a dashboard JWT. This token is separate from mobile app tokens and must be sent as Authorization: Bearer {{dashboardToken}}.

No token required.

Stateless JWT logout no-op. Clients should discard the dashboard token.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

item.name: Overview
item.description: Overview and report endpoints for Dashboard/Admin API testing.

request.description:
Searches dashboard entities such as subscriptions, orders, and users. Exact indexed behavior is implementation-defined.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

Returns notification counters for the dashboard top bar.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

Returns dashboard counters plus recent subscriptions and orders. Read-only.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

Operational report for the current KSA business date. Read-only.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

item.name: Subscriptions
item.description: Subscription dashboard endpoints.

request.description:
Paginated dashboard subscription search.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

exec: if (value && typeof value === "object" && (value.id || value._id)) return value;

request.description:
Exports filtered subscriptions as JSON and sets Content-Disposition. This is not CSV in current code.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

Counts subscriptions by status and remaining meals for the same filters used by list/export.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

Creates a subscription after re-running quote resolution. Side effects: writes subscription, days/contracts via activation service, activity log, and subscription audit log.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

exec: if (value && typeof value === "object" && (value.id || value._id)) return value;

request.description:
Runs the same quote logic used by dashboard create. Use this before creating paid/admin subscriptions.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

Returns serialized dashboard subscription details, including delivery and balances when present.

Past-day policy: before returning subscription detail, the backend auto-settles past non-skipped/non-frozen subscription days according to calendar-based subscription rules. Frontend must not settle days manually. consumed_without_preparation means the day was counted by calendar policy without operational fulfillment; no_show means pickup was ready but the customer did not collect; skipped/frozen do not consume.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

exec: if (value && typeof value === "object" && (value.id || value._id)) return value;

request.description:
Returns SubscriptionAuditLog and ActivityLog rows for the subscription and its days.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Updates delivery/pickup defaults. Side effects: writes subscription audit and activity logs with before/after metadata.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Replaces addonSubscriptions with validated addon plans. Requires reason. Duplicate categories are rejected. Side effects: audit and activity logs.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Superadmin only. Replaces premiumBalance and/or addonBalance arrays. Requires reason. Use complete replacement rows rather than delta fields.

Required role: superadmin. Requires reason and writes audit/activity logs.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Cancels active or pending_payment subscriptions through lifecycle service. Writes audit log; idempotent if already canceled.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Adds days and meals to an active subscription and ensures missing SubscriptionDay rows. Canceled/expired/non-active subscriptions are rejected.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Admin wrapper around subscription freeze logic. Writes audit log when successful.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Admin wrapper around subscription unfreeze logic. Writes audit log when successful.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Returns raw SubscriptionDay rows ordered by date. plannerRevisionHash belongs to mobile day planning/payment safety and should not be bypassed by dashboard workflows.

Past-day policy: backend auto-settles past non-skipped/non-frozen days before returning rows. Frontend must not settle days manually. consumed_without_preparation means the day was counted by calendar policy; no_show means pickup was ready but not collected; skipped/frozen do not consume.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.

Admin wrapper around client skip logic. Side effects: may compensate according to policy and writes audit log.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

Admin wrapper around client unskip logic and writes audit log.

Required role: admin dashboard user unless noted otherwise.
Audit note: include a clear reason where the backend requires or records it.

item.name: Ops
item.description: Unified dashboard operations endpoints for kitchen, courier, and admin workflow. Access may allow admin, kitchen, or courier depending on backend middleware. Action names must match backend-supported action constants.

request.description: Lists operational work items for a business date. Ops endpoints are for kitchen/courier/admin workflow. Access may allow admin, kitchen, or courier depending on backend middleware.
Searches operational work items. The backend returns an empty array for q shorter than 3 characters. Ops endpoints are for kitchen/courier/admin workflow.

Runs a supported operation action for a subscription day or order. Action names must match backend-supported constants: prepare, dispatch, ready_for_pickup, fulfill, cancel, reopen, notify_arrival. Access may allow admin, kitchen, or courier depending on backend middleware.

item.name: Kitchen Board
item.description: Screen-friendly aliases for kitchen preparation. Admin/superadmin and kitchen can use these. Reuses unified Dashboard Ops transition service.

request.description:
List subscription days for kitchen. Shows user, phone, delivery/pickup info, mealSlots, addonSelections, premiumUpgradeSelections, notes, last action, and allowedActions.

Past-day policy: if a past date is requested, backend auto-settles past non-skipped/non-frozen subscription days first. Past planned/open/locked/in-preparation rows should not remain actionable after settlement. Frontend must not settle days manually.

exec: const item = json?.data?.items?.[0] || json?.data?.data?.[0] || json?.data?.[0] || json?.data;
const id = item?.subscriptionDayId || item?.entityId || item?._id || item?.id;
